query: DefiLlama 2026 DeFi hack losses total year-to-date May 2026
answer:
## DeFi Hack Losses in 2026 Year-to-Date (January 1 – May 24, 2026)

### Top-Level Summary

Based on data pulled from the DefiLlama Hacks API (accessed 2026-05-24):

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| **Total hacks tracked** | 84 |
| **Total gross losses** | **$840,815,935** |
| **Total funds returned** | $20,623,000 |
| **Net losses (after returns)** | **$820,192,935** |

For context, the full year of 2025 saw ~97 hacks totaling ~$2.55 billion. In just the first five months of 2026, losses have already reached ~$841 million — about 33% of 2025's full-year total.

---

### Monthly Breakdown

| Month | Hacks | Gross Losses | Funds Returned |
|---|---|---|---|
| January 2026 | 13 | $101,573,000 | $336,000 |
| February 2026 | 8 | $24,211,000 | $0 |
| March 2026 | 15 | $41,264,435 | $862,000 |
| **April 2026** | **27** | **$634,849,950** | **$19,190,000** |
| May 2026 (through 5/23) | 21 | $38,917,550 | $235,000 |

**April 2026 was catastrophic**, accounting for **75.5% of all 2026 losses** (~$635M out of $841M), driven by two massive exploits.

---

### Top 10 Largest Hacks in 2026

| Rank | Date | Protocol | Amount | Chain | Technique |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 2026-04-18 | **Kelp** | **$293,000,000** | Ethereum, Arbitrum | LayerZero OFT bridge exploit |
| 2 | 2026-04-01 | **Drift Trade** | **$285,000,000** | Solana | Compromised Admin + Fake Token Price Manipulation |
| 3 | 2026-01-31 | **Step Finance** | **$40,000,000** | Solana | Private Key Compromised |
| 4 | 2026-01-08 | **Truebit** | **$26,400,000** | Ethereum | Bonding Curve Exploit |
| 5 | 2026-03-21 | **Resolv** | **$24,500,000** | Ethereum | Private Key Compromised |
| 6 | 2026-04-16 | **Rhea Lend** | **$18,400,000** | Near | Fake Collateral Exploit (fully returned) |
| 7 | 2026-04-16 | **Grinex** | **$15,000,000** | Tron, Ethereum | Hot wallet hack (CEX) |
| 8 | 2026-01-25 | **Matcha** | **$13,430,000** | Base, Ethereum | Unlimited Approval Exploit |
| 9 | 2026-05-17 | **Verus-Ethereum Bridge** | **$11,500,000** | Ethereum | Bridge Verification Bypass |
| 10 | 2026-02-22 | **Blend Pools V2** | **$10,970,000** | Stellar | Price Oracle Manipulation |

The **Kelp** ($293M) and **Drift Trade** ($285M) exploits together account for **$578 million — 68.7%** of all 2026 losses.

---

### Breakdown by Attack Classification

| Classification | Hacks | Total Losses | Share |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Infrastructure** (private keys, hot wallets, DNS, bridges) | 12 | $668,791,000 | 79.5% |
| **Protocol Logic** (smart contract bugs, oracle exploits) | 71 | $171,162,935 | 20.4% |
| **Ecosystem** | 1 | $862,000 | 0.1% |

Infrastructure compromises dominate by dollar value despite being only 14% of incidents.

---

### Breakdown by Chain (Top Chains by Loss)

| Chain | Hacks | Total Losses |
|---|---|---|
| Ethereum | 33 | $438,727,000 |
| Solana | 4 | $326,754,000 |
| Arbitrum | 11 | $298,629,000 |
| Base | 19 | $40,528,000 |
| BSC | 14 | $28,491,000 |

*(Some hacks span multiple chains and are counted under each.)*

---

### Fund Recovery

Only **$20.6 million (2.5%)** of stolen funds have been returned, with the largest recovery being Rhea Lend's full $18.4M return.

---

### Note on Bybit Hack

The Bybit hack ($1.4 billion) occurred on **2025-02-21** and does **not** fall within the 2026 YTD window.

sources.title: DefiLlama Hacks API
sources.snippet: API endpoint providing comprehensive data on all tracked DeFi/crypto hacks including amounts, dates, chains, techniques, and fund returns.

sources.title: DefiLlama Hacks Dashboard
sources.snippet: Visual dashboard tracking all DeFi hacks with filtering by date, chain, and amount.

key_facts: DefiLlama tracks 84 DeFi/crypto hacks in 2026 YTD (Jan 1 – May 24, 2026) with $840,815,935 in gross losses.
Net losses after fund returns total $820,192,935 (only $20.6M or 2.5% of stolen funds returned).
April 2026 was the worst month with $634,849,950 in losses from 27 incidents (75.5% of YTD total).
The Kelp LayerZero OFT bridge exploit ($293M, April 18) and Drift Trade admin compromise ($285M, April 1) account for 68.7% of all 2026 losses.
Infrastructure attacks (private keys, bridge exploits, admin compromises) caused 79.5% of losses by value despite being only 14% of incidents by count.
Ethereum ($438.7M across 33 hacks) and Solana ($326.8M across 4 hacks) are the most-impacted chains by dollar value.
Full-year 2025 saw ~$2.55 billion in losses across 97 hacks; 2026 YTD is at ~33% of that total through five months.
The Bybit hack ($1.4B) occurred on 2025-02-21 and is NOT included in 2026 figures.
Other major 2026 hacks include Step Finance ($40M), Truebit ($26.4M), Resolv ($24.5M), and Rhea Lend ($18.4M, fully returned).
May 2026 (through May 23) has seen 21 hacks totaling $38.9M, with the Verus-Ethereum Bridge exploit ($11.5M) being the largest.

data_points.metric: Total gross DeFi hack losses 2026 YTD
Drift Trade exploit loss (second largest 2026 hack)
